mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.theme_color, r.transport_type, r.cover_photo_url, r.cover_title, r.friendship_level, r.exp_point, r.status, r.scheduled_delete_at, r.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members active_members WHERE active_members.room_id = r.id AND active_members.status = 'ACTIVE') AS member_count, me.is_favorite, me.status_message AS my_status_message FROM friendship_rooms r JOIN room_members me ON me.room_id = r.id AND me.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.id = #{roomId}

SELECT r.id, r.name, r.description, r.theme_color, r.transport_type, r.cover_photo_url, r.friendship_level, r.status, r.created_at, me.is_favorite, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members a WHERE a.room_id = r.id AND a.status = 'ACTIVE') AS member_count, np.title AS next_plan_title, np.plan_date AS next_plan_date FROM friendship_rooms r JOIN room_members me ON me.room_id = r.id AND me.user_id = #{userId} AND me.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN plans np ON np.id = ( SELECT p.id FROM plans p WHERE p.room_id = r.id AND p.status = 'SCHEDULED' AND p.plan_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY p.plan_date ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY me.is_favorite DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, description, theme_color, transport_type, cover_photo_url, cover_title, friendship_level, exp_point, status, scheduled_delete_at, created_at FROM friendship_rooms WHERE id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (room_id, recipient_id, actor_id, type) SELECT #{roomId}, user_id, #{actorId}, 'NOTICE' FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.room_id, l.triggered_by, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, l.action_type, l.exp_delta, l.reference_id, l.created_at FROM friendship_exp_logs l JOIN users u ON u.id = l.triggered_by WHERE l.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendship_exp_logs (room_id, triggered_by, action_type, exp_delta, reference_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{triggeredBy}, #{actionType}, #{expDelta}, #{referenceId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, theme_color, transport_type, cover_photo_url, cover_title, friendship_level, exp_point, status, scheduled_delete_at, created_at FROM friendship_rooms WHERE id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
